province: Central Equatoria State Juba 近郊
notes: Global Cement 2024 年报道，B Smart 计划在朱巴附近投资 1 亿美元建设水泥厂，使用来自 Kapoeta 的石灰石，预计 24 个月内投产；产能未披露[46]。

name: Holcim Madagascar Plant (Ibity/Antananarivo)
notes: Holcim operates a 粉磨站 near Ibity which imports clinker; capacity details not publicly available. To be verified.

name: Cimasso / Ciment Madagascar Plant
notes: Reports in early 2020s suggested plans to build an integrated cement plant in Madagascar; data not yet verified.

name: Cimenterie de Lukala (CILU)
notes: Heidelberg Materials 控股；GEM 约 0.36 Mtpa，按《国际水泥评论》产能 0.435 Mtpa 计。

name: Carrière de Lualaba (Carrilu Plant)
owner: Lualaba Carrilu 与 Zijin Mining 合资
notes: Lualaba Carrilu 与 Zijin Mining 合资；行业报道设计能力约 0.8 Mtpa，本表按 0.80 Mtpa，其他来源在 0.55–0.80 Mtpa 区间，待进一步校准。

name: Cimenterie de Lubudi (CimenKat Lubudi)
owner: La Grande Cimenterie du Katanga (GCK) 系公司旗下；Gécamines SA 与 HMIE 集团联合
notes: GCK 系老厂，GEM 记录综合产能 0.087 Mtpa。

name: Cimenterie Nationale de Kimpese (CINAT)
owner: 国家拥有约 92%，其余由 Nova Cimangola 等持股
notes: 国有约 92%；1974 投产、2011 起停产，设计产能 0.30 Mtpa，政府推动审计与复产。

name: Grande Cimenterie du Katanga (GCK Likasi)
notes: Gécamines 与 West China Cement(HMIE) 合资 Likasi 熟料厂；按 ICR 报道设计产能 1.2 Mtpa。

name: Interlacs Grinding Units (Scancem)
province: 具体地点不详（可能在 Goma、Bukavu）
notes: Heidelberg/Scancem 旗下两座 Interlacs 粉磨站，每座 <0.1 Mtpa；本表按 0.10 Mtpa/站，2 站合计 <0.20 Mtpa。

name: Kabimba Cement Plant (Interlacs / Great Lakes Cement)
owner: West China Cement Ltd 100% 持股
notes: South Kivu 省 Kabimba 熟料厂，West China Cement 100% 持股；GEM 记载水泥 1.5 Mtpa、熟料 1.2 Mtpa。

name: Nyumba Ya Akiba (CIMKO)
owner: Lucky Cement (Pakistan) 与 Groupe Rawji 各 50% 持股
province: Kongo Central 省 Songololo（Kinshasa 近郊）
notes: Kongo Central 省 Songololo，Lucky Cement 与 Groupe Rawji 各 50%；按非开行文件 1.2 Mtpa 计，GEM 记载 1.3 Mtpa。

name: PPC Barnet Kimpese Cement Plant
notes: PPC/Barnet/IFC 合资 Kimpese 熟料厂；GEM 设计产能 1.09 Mtpa，Africa Outlook 报道为 1.2 Mtpa，实际产量约 0.4–0.5 Mtpa。

name: Cimenterie de Maïko (CIMAIKO)
notes: 沿用原设计 0.30 Mtpa，老厂的复产投资方案；产能以 Maiko 1.0 Mtpa 为准，汇总时不应重复计量。

name: 卡塔纳
notes: 旧 0.1 Mt 级微型磨站，45 km 北 Bukavu；并购后计划 2026 前环保升级。

name: GLC大湖公司
notes: 3 500 t/d 新干法线，2022-12 投产；面向湖区四国出口熟料，价格优势明显，正申请 6 MW 余热发电。

name: Atbara Cement Plant
notes: GEM 记录 Atbara 是苏丹大型熟料厂，设计产能 1.7 Mtpa [47]；Global Cement 分析指苏丹共有约六家水泥厂，总产能约 7 Mtpa，但因燃料短缺利用率较低[48]。

name: Al Takamol (Asec) Cement Plant
notes: Global Cement 分析提到苏丹还有 Al Takamol、Berber、Al Salam、North (Shamal) 等多座熟料厂，总产能约 6–7 Mtpa，但缺乏具体数据[48]。

name: Berber Cement Plant
notes: 同上；详细产能、坐标和股权待验证。

name: North (Al Shamal) Cement Plant
notes: 同上；缺乏公开资料。

name: Al Salam Cement Plant
notes: 同上；需要进一步信息。

name: Chilanga (Lafarge Zambia) Cement Plant
notes: 未能在本次研究中获取可靠文献；据业内普遍认识 Chilanga 为赞比亚主要熟料厂之一，产能大约 1 Mtpa，需进一步验证。

name: Dangote Ndola Cement Plant
notes: 通常认为 Dangote 在 Ndola 附近运营一座熟料厂，产能约 1.5 Mtpa；缺乏可引用的公开资料。

name: Zambezi Portland Cement Plant
notes: Zambezi Portland 是一家私营熟料厂，产能约 0.5 Mtpa；由于未找到可靠资料，需进一步验证。

name: CIMAF Chad Cement Plant
owner: Ciments de l’Afrique (CIMAF) 全资子公司
notes: 多篇新闻与论文提及 CIMAF Chad 为本国主力水泥供应商，产能未公开；CIMAF 官方及 CemNet 新闻 2025-03 仅谈价格争议，未披露规模。来源：CemNet“CIMAF Chad denies ex-works price increase” 2025, CGCA-02 论文 2025, IFC/Proparco CIMAF 区域项目说明。(cemnet.com)

name: SONACIM National Cement Plant
owner: Société Nationale de Cimenterie (国有/国控)
notes: Global Cement Report 统计显示乍得有 1 座一体化厂 + 1 座研磨站，总产能约 0.7Mt；但未公开逐厂拆分，暂无法给出单厂值。来源：CemNet GCR 国家页 2024。(cemnet.com)

name: Ngara Cement Plant (Chad Cement)
notes: GEM 报道为 Pala 地区一座水泥厂，产能与线数未披露，状态为运营。来源：GEM Ngara Cement Plant 2025。(Global Energy Monitor)

name: CIMAF Douala Cement Plant
notes: 报道称喀麦隆 5 家水泥厂中，CIMAF 与 Medcem 各有 0.5Mt/yr 磨机，位于 Douala。来源：Cameroon Concord News“Cameroon to build fifth cement plant” 2017；Business in Cameroon 报道 2024 CIMAF 计划将喀麦隆产能提升至 1.5Mt。(cameroonconcordnews.com)

name: CIMENCAM Bonaberi (Douala)
notes: 作为老牌 LaFarge/Holcim 工厂，多篇新闻提及其 1.5Mt/yr 级别；GEM 记录为运营中磨机，具体数值在付费版中，故保留“待验证”区间。来源：CemNet, GEM 2025。(cemnet.com)

name: CIMENCAM Nomayos Plant
notes: 2023 年新道路通车，用于服务 Nomayos 新线，为喀中南三省供货；公开报道未披露精确 Mtpa，仅提“新熟料线”。来源：CemNet 2024“Cameroon’s cement capacity begins to soar”。(cemnet.com)

name: Dangote Cement Cameroon – Douala
notes: Dangote 官方称 Douala 磨机产能 1.5Mt/yr，2015 投运；主要使用进口熟料+本地火山灰。来源：Dangote 官方网站 Cameroon 页。(Welcome to Dangote Cement Plc)

name: Medcem Cameroon – Douala
notes: 作为喀麦隆第五家水泥厂之一，产能 0.5Mt/yr；与 CIMAF 共同构成中小磨机玩家。来源：Cameroon Concord News 2017。(cameroonconcordnews.com)

name: CIMAF Abidjan Cement Plant
notes: GEM 记录为运营中的磨机，但未披露产能；CemNet 报道 CIMAF 在科特迪瓦计划第三厂后，总产能将达 2.3Mt/yr（按全国口径），单厂拆分需进一步确认。来源：GEM, CemNet 2016“CIMAF to open third plant in Cote D’Ivoire”。(Global Energy Monitor)

name: LafargeHolcim CI (Abidjan Works)
notes: 官方统计显示科特迪瓦无熟料厂、14 座研磨站总产能 18.85Mt（GCR 数据），单厂产能未披露；政府“其它制造业”报告称主要玩家含 LafargeHolcim CI、Dangote CI 与 CIMAF。来源：CemNet GCR、科特迪瓦经济部官网 2025。(cemnet.com)

name: Dangote Cement Cote d’Ivoire
notes: 多篇新闻提及 Dangote 进入科特迪瓦市场，但具体厂址和 Mtpa 尚未在免费数据库中查到；暂仅记录为“已知项目，数据待验证”。

name: Akoga Cement Plant (Grupo Abayak)
notes: FLSmidth 获 6800 万欧元合同，在 Akoga 建设 3000t/d 熟料线绿色工厂，约合 ~1Mt/yr 级别，但实际设计年产能与投产情况未在公开资料中更新，因此不做换算，仅保留“3000t/d 线”。来源：ZKG 2012。(zkg.de)

name: CIMAF Gabon – Owendo 粉磨站(s)
notes: Proparco 2020 贷款说明 + GlobalCement 2025 报道：原有 Owendo 磨机约 0.4–0.5Mt/yr，在 2019–2020 新增第二条 0.35Mt/yr 线，并计划第三条线后总产能提升至 1.85Mt/yr。具体每线拆分仍待 CIMAF 披露。来源：Proparco 2020、Cemac-Eco 2019、GlobalCement 2025。(proparco.fr)

name: CIMGabon Ntoum 熟料厂
owner: 早期 HeidelbergCement(75%) + 国家(25%)；后被 CIMAF 收购
notes: 旧湿法窑，约 0.4Mt/yr，因原料枯竭已停产；CIMAF 2014 收购 HeidelbergCement 股权后关闭 Ntoum 熟料厂，仅保留 Owendo 磨机。来源：CemNet“Gabon moves towards self-sufficiency” 2015。(cemnet.com)

name: CIMGabon / CIMAF Franceville 粉磨站
notes: 同一来源提及 Franceville 有一座磨机但常年闲置，出口导向；产能未披露。(cemnet.com)

name: Cimenterie Atlas – Dio Gare 粉磨站
notes: CemNet 2024《Mali’s path to cement self-sufficiency》：Atlas 在 Dio-Gare 新建 0.8Mt/yr 磨机，预计 2025 投产，投资额约 500 亿非 CFA。(cemnet.com)

name: CIMAF Mali – Dio Gare Plant
notes: 同文提及 CIMAF Dio-Gare 磨机正在扩产 +0.5Mt/yr，但基础产能未披露，因此总设计产能标“待验证”。(cemnet.com)

name: CIMAF Mali – Natien 熟料厂
notes: 2024-02 CIMAF 在 Natien 奠基新一体化水泥厂，官方未披露产能，属于 IFC/Proparco 区域扩张的一部分。(cemnet.com)

name: Diamond Cement Mali – Astro Plant (Dio-Gare)
notes: Diamond 官方：Astro 线 2800 t/d 熟料，设计 1.0Mt/yr Clinker。CemNet 2024 文中则称该磨机为 0.7Mt 粉磨站，存在口径差异；此表按集团官网 1.0Mt 计，并在此注明“另有说法：0.7Mt/yr”。(diamondcement.com)

name: Diamond Kati Cement Plant
notes: GEM 记录为 Kati 地区运营磨机，但未披露 Mtpa；仅登记项目存在。(Global Energy Monitor)

name: CMM (Vicat) – Diago Cement Mill
notes: Vicat 官方 2019：Diago 新磨机年产 500,000 吨，目标是使马里在水泥上实现自给。(vicat.com)

name: Malbaza Cement Plant (MCC)
owner: Malbaza Cement Company SA (本地私营+多方金融机构)
notes: GEM 与 CemNet：2018 年末首产，2019 正式投运，水泥产能 0.65Mt/yr；由西非开发银行与本地银行联合融资，投资约 660 亿非 CFA。(Global Energy Monitor)

name: Nouvelle Cimenterie de Niger (NCN Malbaza New Plant)
province: Malbaza 区（待验证具体地块）
notes: GEM：规划中新厂，设计 0.73Mt/yr 水泥产能，业主为 NCN，状态为“Announced”。(Global Energy Monitor)

name: 其它小规模研磨站
notes: Global Cement Report 显示尼日尔除 Malbaza 外尚有其他水泥生产单位，但公开免费信息不足以逐一确认名称与规模，故在此统一标“待验证”。(uncclearn.org)

name: Dangote Cement Congo Plant
notes: USGS 2022：刚果（布）有 3 家企业（Dangote、FORSPAK、SONOCC），合计产能 >2Mt，其中最大的一座 1.5Mt/yr 为 Dangote 所有；Diamond Cement 另在 Mindouli 有 0.7Mt/yr 厂。(d9-wret.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com)

name: Diamond Cement Mindouli Plant
notes: USGS 2020-21 明确指出 Diamond Cement Group 在 Mindouli 运营 0.7Mt/yr 水泥厂。(美国地质调查局出版物库)

name: SONOCC – Loutété Cement Plant
owner: Société Nouvelle des Ciments du Congo (SONOCC)
notes: CemNet/USGS：Loutété 厂长期存在，早期由 Scancem/Heidelberg 参与，后经合资重组为 SONOCC；近年因检修曾短暂停产后复产，产能未在公开渠道给出具体数值。(cemnet.com)

name: FORSPAK Cement Plant (Pointe-Noire)
notes: USGS 2022：将 FORSPAK 列为三大水泥生产企业之一，但不含具体 Mtpa 与投产年份。(d9-wret.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com)

name: Cimfaso (CIMBURKINA) – 熟料厂
notes: 多篇行业文献称 Cimfaso 在首都拥有一体化厂，是 Cim Metal Group 核心资产之一，产能约 1.0–1.2Mt/yr，但免费来源未给出最终确定值，因此保留“待验证”。(globalcement.com)

name: Cimfaso – 粉磨站(s)
notes: 同组在瓦加杜古还拥有独立磨机，总产能与一体化厂合计约 3.2Mt/yr（按部分技术文献推断），具体拆分需依赖 GCR/公司年报。

name: Cimasso – Bobo-Dioulasso 粉磨站
notes: Intercem 与 ZKG 等技术文献明确：Cimasso 磨机设计产能 2.0Mt/yr，后续扩建后有望接近 4Mt/yr。(zkg.de)

name: CIMAF Burkina Plant
province: 近 Ouagadougou/Bobo（具体厂址待确认）
notes: IFC/Proparco 等文件确认 CIMAF 在布基纳有磨机项目，但公开材料未拆分具体 Mtpa。(globalcement.com)

name: GCM Industries – Kossodo Cement Plant
notes: GlobalCement 报道：GCM 计划在 Kossodo 建设 0.64Mt/yr 磨机，以缓解当地供应紧张。(globalcement.com)

name: CIMAF Gabon – Meba / New Clinker Project
notes: Ecofin 2024：CIMAF Gabon 计划斥资约 1.47 亿美元在 Meba 建设新熟料+磨机一体化项目，新增约 1Mt/yr 级别产能，用以减少熟料进口。(Ecofin Agency)

name: 其它小规模砖/粉磨项目
notes: 仅在零星新闻中出现，不能确认其是否达到“水泥厂”规模，按你规则不纳入完整水泥厂清单。

name: Sumbe Cement Plant (FCKS)
notes: 熟料厂 producing clinker and cement; cement capacity 1.4 Mt/yr, clinker 1.7 Mt/yr; commissioned 2013[1][2].

name: Benguela / Catumbela (Cimenfort) Plant
owner: Cimenfort Industrial Lda (Genea Angola et al.)
notes: Started as a 粉磨站 in 2012 and upgraded with a clinker kiln by 2019; capacity 1.4 Mt cement, 1.5 Mt clinker[3][4].

name: Secil Lobito Cement Plant
notes: 粉磨站 producing about 350 kt/yr of cement[5][6]. A new 1.2 Mt/yr 熟料厂 has been proposed but not built[7].

name: Nova Cimangola (Sequele/Cacuaco) Plant
owner: Nova Cimangola – joint venture (state and private investors)
notes: New 熟料厂 inaugurated 2017; sources report capacity around 2.4 Mt/yr of cement and 3.8 Mt/yr after expansion[8][9]; built by Sinoma/Loesche and replaced the old Kikolo plant. Coordinates to be verified.

name: Nova Cimangola – Kikolo (Old) Plant
notes: Older 熟料厂 (Nova Cimangola I); 1.8 Mt/yr cement capacity; decommissioned when new Sequele plant opened[10].

name: Mazozo / CIF Bom Jesus Plant
owner: China International Fund (CIF) – formerly; currently being privatised by Angolan government
notes: Large 熟料厂 commissioned 2014; cement capacity ~3.6–3.8 Mt/yr, clinker 3.2 Mt/yr; once supplied ~41 % of Angola’s cement market[11][12].

name: Palanca Cimentos (Lobito) Project
owner: Gema Group, Escom, Camargo Corrêa (BGGA consortium)
notes: Proposed in 2007–2010 to build an 熟料厂 with ~1.8 Mt clinker and 1.6 Mt cement capacity[13][14]; project stalled and appears abandoned.

name: Cabinda Plant (Cimenfort)
notes: Cimenfort announced in 2019 plans to develop a new cement plant in Cabinda; capacity not yet specified[15]; project status uncertain.

name: Ohorongo Cement Plant (Sargberg/Otavi)
owner: Schwenk Namibia (60%), Development Bank of Namibia (10%), Industrial Development Corporation of South Africa (20%), Government of Namibia (10%)
notes: Only 熟料厂 in Namibia; production started Dec 2010; initial capacity 0.7 Mt/yr and later expanded to exceed 1 Mt/yr with investments around N$150 m[16][17].

name: Whale Rock (Cheetah) Cement Plant
owner: Whale Rock Cement (Hong Xiang Holdings 70%, local partners 30%)
notes: Commissioned 2018; 熟料厂 with 1.2 Mt/yr capacity; investment cost US$350 million[18][19].

name: PPC Botswana Gaborone Plant
notes: 粉磨站 built 1996; imports clinker from South Africa; capacity 0.4 Mt/yr[20].

name: Matsiloje Portland Cement Plant (Nortex)
owner: Nortex (formerly Matsiloje Portland Cement; now owned by Whale Rock Cement)
notes: Small 熟料厂 producing ~36 kt/yr; closed around 2018 due to competition but acquired by Whale Rock Cement; plans to upgrade capacity to 0.9 Mt/yr by 2023[21][22].

name: Dangote Botswana Blending Plant
province: Location to be announced (likely near Gaborone)
notes: Dangote announced plans in 2025 to build a new cement blending plant in Botswana; capacity details not yet released[23].

name: PPC Colleen Bawn Cement Plant
owner: PPC Zimbabwe (PPC Ltd 88%; Zimbabwean pension funds 12%)
notes: Long‑established 熟料厂 (1946); current cement capacity 0.83 Mt/yr and clinker 0.3 Mt/yr[24].

name: PPC Bulawayo Plant
notes: PPC’s older 粉磨站 (1913), capacity ~0.76 Mt/yr[25].

name: PPC Harare (Masasa) Plant
notes: Modern 粉磨站 commissioned 2016; design capacity 0.7 Mt/yr; cost US$85 m and doubled PPC Zimbabwe’s capacity[26][27].

name: Sino–Zimbabwe (Gweru) Cement Plant
owner: Joint venture between China Building Materials Corporation and Industrial Development Corporation of Zimbabwe
notes: 熟料厂 started 2001; cement capacity 0.25 Mt/yr; clinker production 700 t/day after upgrade; joint venture ownership[28][29].

name: Khayah Cement (formerly Lafarge) Harare Plant
notes: Plant built in 1956 as Circle Cement; design capacity ~1 Mt/yr but current operations limited to ~450 kt/yr due to equipment problems and currency shortages[30][31].

name: Diamond Cement / Livetouch (Redcliff) Plant
notes: 粉磨站 opened 2017 with 0.4 Mt/yr capacity; uses clinker imported from PPC; community has raised environmental concerns[32][33].

name: Shungai (Chegutu) Cement Plant
notes: Construction started 2024; plant is about 55 % complete; expected to produce >0.8 Mt/yr and start operations in early 2026[34][35].

name: Hwange Cement Plant (JianQiang)
notes: Part of a US$1 bn investment plan; the Hwange plant is reported to have a design capacity of 50 000 t per month (~0.6 Mt/yr)[37].

name: Magunje Growth Point
notes: US$1 bn 工业园：2.7 Mt 熟料＋0.9 Mt 磨站；场平完毕，接电完成；预计 2025-06 首线投产，就业 1 500+。

name: 布拉瓦约
notes: 0.9 Mt 磨站获市政批准；预计 2026 投产；将缓解南部水泥短缺。

name: Matola I Cement Plant (Cimentos de Moçambique)
notes: Oldest 熟料厂 in Mozambique; 2014 capacity ~0.70 Mt/yr[38]; remains the backbone of InterCement’s operations.

name: Dondo Cement Plant (Cimentos de Moçambique)
notes: Originally an 熟料厂 with ~0.74 Mt/yr capacity; undergoing US$60 m upgrade adding a new clinker kiln and vertical mill; capacity will reach 1.3 Mt/yr[39][40].

name: Nacala 熟料厂 (InterCement) – planned upgrade
notes: Currently a 0.35 Mt/yr 粉磨站; being converted to an 熟料厂 with a 3000 t/day clinker kiln (~1.1 Mt clinker)[41][39].

name: Nacala Greenfield Plant (West China Cement)
owner: Moçambique Dugongo Cimentos (West China Cement & SPI)
notes: Foundation stone laid Aug 2023 for a greenfield 熟料厂 with capacity 1.8 Mt/yr; completion expected July 2025[39].

name: Bela Vista / Dugongo 熟料厂
owner: Moçambique Dugongo Cimentos (West China Cement 60%; Mozambican partners 40%)
province: Maputo Province – Bela Vista, Matutuine district
notes: Large 熟料厂 commissioned around 2021; capacity ~1.8 Mt/yr; considered Mozambique’s largest plant[39].

name: Austral Dondo Cement Plant
notes: 粉磨站 commissioned 2014 with 0.55 Mt/yr capacity[42].

name: Huaxin Dondo Cement Plant
notes: 粉磨站 with 1 Mt/yr capacity; imports clinker; part of Huaxin’s operations[43].

name: Limak Matola Grinding & Packing Plant
